assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddConfigurationStore with options that include ConfigureDbContext using UseSqlServer
Program.cs calls AddOperationalStore with options that include ConfigureDbContext using UseSqlServer
Both store registrations include MigrationsAssembly set to the host project assembly name (e.g. typeof(Program).Assembly.GetName().Name or equivalent)
assertions.rationale: MigrationsAssembly is not set in either store registration. This is the most common EF setup error.

assertions.assertion: AddOperationalStore options set EnableTokenCleanup to true and TokenCleanupInterval to 1800
The connection string is read from configuration via builder.Configuration.GetConnectionString("IdentityServer") or equivalent
